raw_response_text:
<features>
- observable feature: long fur
- observable feature: pointed ears
- observable feature: cat
</features>
<kb>
- IF [observable visual features = long fur AND pointed ears AND cat] THEN [20]
- IF [observable visual features = long fur AND pointed ears AND dog] THEN [29]
- IF [observable visual features = large size AND short fur AND dog] THEN [28]
- IF [observable visual features = medium size AND spotted coat AND dog] THEN [13]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the image shows a cat with long fur and pointed ears, which matches the condition for class 20.
</rule_check>

<response>20</response>
